briefs.title: Burnaby Council Advances Several Rezoning and Housing Proposals at March 24 Meeting
briefs.summary: At its March 24, 2026 meeting, Burnaby City Council voted on a range of proposals including new rezoning applications for mixed-use and residential developments, a $4.2M water metering contract, and a modular housing pilot project that was sent back to staff for further review.
briefs.action_required: If you own or lease property near 6535 Kingsway, 5058 Imperial Street, or 2757 Norland Avenue, watch for upcoming public notices on rezoning bylaws.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Transportation & Logistics
